            import t6
            from t6 import *

                              '__loader__', '__name__', '__package__',
                              '__path__', '__spec__', 'eggs', 'ham', 'spam'])
            self.assertEqual(dir(), ['eggs', 'ham', 'self', 'spam', 't6'])
